intro.title: World's #1 Innovation Cloud
intro.body: Founded in 1999, BRIGHTIDEA launched its first online innovation platform in 2000 and has since supported more than 300 global brands, including Accenture, Bayer, Cisco, GE, and Mastercard, in generating substantial financial value through innovation. Recognized by G2 as a leading Idea Management platform and featured by outlets such as Business Wire, ZDNET, The Wall Street Journal, and GigaOm, BRIGHTIDEA now offers a comprehensive software suite covering the entire innovation journey.

stats.label: Of customers achieved positive ROI within 12 months.

cards.title: Idea Box
cards.description: Idea Box helps organizations capture, manage, evaluate, and track ideas across departments and teams of any size.

cards.title: Program
cards.description: Program helps organizations drive innovative thinking, engage employees, and deliver business impact with minimal resources.

cards.title: Hackathon
cards.description: Hackathon helps organizations coordinate stakeholders, execute flawless events, and deliver engagement and innovation the business values.

cards.title: Transformation
cards.description: Transformation helps organizations drive cultural, digital, or organizational change and embed it across the company.

cards.title: Labs
cards.description: Labs helps organizations nurture higher-risk ideas outside core operations and fund only the most promising projects.

cards.title: Ecosystem
cards.description: Ecosystem helps organizations connect external resources and integrate them into a broader innovation strategy.
